allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Complete portfolio implementation with i18n, booking calendar, and modern UI

- Add multilingual support (FR/EN) with next-intl
- Implement all sections: Hero, About, Skills, Experience, Projects, Contact
- Add Cal.com booking calendar integration with timezone support
- Add contact form with Resend email integration
- Implement theme toggle with View Transitions API animation
- Add project cards with flip animation for more details
- Add responsive navbar with mobile menu
- Configure SEO with robots.txt and sitemap
- Add custom UI components (card-flip, text-flip, vortex background)
- Style with Tailwind CSS v4 and shadcn/ui components
EOF
)")
